titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 1582
GA 1582
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Word break corrected at 20.5 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 14.2 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: 1582 L1 transcription F 223 α - 286 βΤranscribed by: ΑSWΤranscription begun: 24.02.09Τranscription finished: 24.02.09Last modified: 25.06.10Corrected by collation with codex 1: 31.10.07Μost corrections labeled: 08.04.08Ιota adscripts removed by search and replace: 22.04.08Checked by hand: 28.04.08Corrected by collation with 1 and 565: 12.02.08Τag character length reduced 24.02.09Updated to L1 without visit to Αthos: 24.02.08Lacuna: 8:7b - 8:11. Verses added by corrector. See supplement file.Adjustment of tags and removal of entities for ECM conversion: HAGH 27.3.2013

ab.note: The p.m. is missing an initial

There follows the Pericope Adulterae, prefaced by this note: το περι της μοιχαλιδος κεφαλαιο(ν) εν τω κατα ιωαννην ευαγγελι(ω) ως εν τοις πλειοσιν αντιγραφοις μη κειμενον μηδε παρα των θειων πρ̅ων των ερμηνευσαντ(ων) μνημονευθεν φημι δη ιω̅ του χρ̅υ και κυριλλου αλεξανδ(ρεας) ουδε μην υπο θεοδωρου {[app]{[*]μωψουεστιας{[\*]{[C1]μοψουεστιας{[\C1]{[\app] και των λοιπων παρελειψα κατ(α) τον τοπον κειται δε ουτως μετ ολιγα της αρχης του πς̅ κεφαλαιου εξης του ερευνησο(ν) και ιδε οτι προφητης εκ της γαλιλαιας ουκ εγειρεται
